prompt: A vibrant Japanese fast-food promotional anime poster in a vertical layout, themed around McDonald's recommendations. The background is a bold red and white graphic design with golden sparkles, sweeping shapes, and energetic ad-style composition. In the upper left corner, show the McDonald's golden arches logo inside a red square. On the left half, feature a stylish anime girl with fox or wolf ears and a fluffy tail, shown from mid-thigh up, wearing a modern dark navy and black streetwear outfit with blue accents: cropped top exposing the midriff, layered jacket, belt, straps, and small decorative pins. Her hair is dark purple, medium-length and tousled. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft blurred rectangular censor block. She holds a large sesame-seed burger in her left hand and gestures invitingly with her right hand toward the food items. Across the top right, include large Japanese headline text reading 彩葉のおすすめ！マクドナルド, with a smaller black banner beneath it reading 食べたくなる定番メニューをチェック！. Arrange 4 numbered menu callouts in rounded white speech-bubble labels with red and yellow accents: item 1 is ビッグマック next to a Big Mac image near the center-right; item 2 is マックフライポテト next to a tall red fries carton on the right; item 3 is チキンマックナゲット next to an open nugget box containing exactly 6 chicken nuggets and a cup of red dipping sauce near the lower center-right; item 4 is てりやきマックバーガー next to a glossy teriyaki burger near the lower left-center. Also place a white McDonald's drink cup with ice and dark soda in the bottom left. On the right side, include 2 small informational badges stacked vertically: one badge with a sun and moon icon and Japanese text 朝は朝マック、夜は夜マックも楽しめる！, and one badge with a smartphone icon and Japanese text アプリでモバイルオーダーも便利！. At the very bottom, add a large bold Japanese slogan in white and yellow on a red banner: 今日はマックに行きたくなる！. Add tiny disclaimer text along the lower edge. The illustration style is polished, colorful anime key visual art mixed with commercial food photography rendering for the burgers, fries, nuggets, and drink; highly appetizing, glossy lighting, clean outlines, dynamic ad composition, and a cheerful promotional mood.
